rulings.Case Title: PURE ENTERTAINMENT LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SHUI KING KWON HOM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday January 9, 2019 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT VLAD COOD, PURE ENTERTAINMENT, LLC, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication GRANTED. Moving party shifted its burden and opposing party failed to create a triable issue of fact with competent admissible evidence. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: VINCENZO J SIGNORETTI VS. KEN CROMPTON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday January 9, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT GBP6, LP, A DELAWARE LIMITED PARTNERSHIP Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default GRANTED subject to Defendant filing an answer no later than January 9, 2019 at 4:00 p.m. Moving Party has met all requisite elements of CCP section 473.5 to set aside the default. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN PAXTON VS. 330 PRESIDIO AVENUE, LLC ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday January 9, 2019 line 3. Order To Show Cause DENIED. Plaintiff failed to carry its burden and show probability of prevailing on the merits and Defendants demonstrated that they are likely to suffer great injury from the granting of preliminary injunction. Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice is GRANTED. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CAROL ANN TRAVLOS VS. JACKIELYN HARRIS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday January 9, 2019 line 4. DEFENDANT JACKIELYN HARRIS, AMBER MCGEARY DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to January 17, 2019. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the operative First Amended Complaint to Department 501 no later than January 14, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide a courtesy copy of the opposition to Department 501 no later than January 14, 2019 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SH LUNG 2SF LLC VS. KIRENIA ALVAREZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday January 9, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT KIRENIA ALVAREZ MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT continued to January 15, 2019 per stipulation of parties at January 7, 2019 trial call. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 1370 NATOMA, LLC VS. JOSE LUIS PALMA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday January 9, 2019 line 6. DEFENDANT JOSE PALMA, NELY MARTINEZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR. A First Amended Complaint was subsequently filed in this case, rendering the demurrer moot. = (501/CFH)
